name: Chewy Apple Moons
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the fruit.
2. Combine apple juice concentrate and apples; let stand 10 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Beat eggs in a medium bowl.
5. Blend in the concentrated mixture, butter, and vanilla.
6. Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
7. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes, until firm and golden brown.
9. Cool wire racks.
10. Store in tightly covered container.
